steps.action: Navigate to /admin/articles/new and click Save Article with title blank
steps.expected: Title required validation is shown and article is not created
steps.observed: Inline error 'Title is required' shown on form; no matching article row created

evidence.network: Supplemental API contract check: POST /api/admin/articles -> 400 {"error":"Title is required"} (network-curl-evidence.txt)

steps.action: Enter title and invalid URI 'my article!' then submit
steps.expected: Validation rejects URI with alpha-dash error; no article created
steps.observed: Inline error 'URI may only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores' shown; no matching article row created

evidence.network: Supplemental API contract check: POST /api/admin/articles -> 400 {"error":"URI may only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores"} (network-curl-evidence.txt)

assertions.title: Add article — weight must be numeric

steps.action: Attempt to enter non-numeric order value 'abc' and submit
steps.expected: Validation error 'Order must be a numeric value'; no article created
steps.observed: Browser number input blocks alpha typing; after temporary DOM type=text workaround, form showed 'Order must be a numeric value'; no matching article row created

evidence.network: Supplemental API contract check: POST /api/admin/articles with order="abc" -> 400 {"error":"Order must be a numeric value"} (network-curl-evidence.txt)

steps.action: Create article with namespaced title/URI and provide attachment title + valid .txt file on add form
steps.expected: Article created, attachment uploaded, redirect to edit page with attachment listed
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/articles/15/edit; attachments table shows uploaded file and metadata

evidence.network: Browser captured POST /api/admin/articles and POST /api/admin/articles/15/attachments; supplemental API verify GET /api/admin/articles/15 -> 200 with attachment metadata (network-requests-agent-browser.json, network-curl-evidence.txt)
evidence.dbFileChecks: db-file-checks.json: checks.VAL-ART-050.attachmentsCount = 1 and file exists at /Users/nbbaier/68kb/app/uploads/15/1773938655871_g8val_valid_attachment.txt

assertions.title: Upload with invalid file type

steps.action: Create article on add form with attachment title + invalid .exe file
steps.expected: Upload rejected with visible error; no file stored; no attachment row
steps.observed: Article saved and redirected to edit page with success toast; no visible invalid-file error on add flow. Backend rejected invalid type and no attachment/file was created

evidence.network: Browser captured POST /api/admin/articles/16/attachments; supplemental API check POST /api/admin/articles/16/attachments with .exe -> 400 {"error":"File type .exe is not allowed..."} (network-requests-agent-browser.json, network-curl-evidence.txt)
evidence.dbFileChecks: db-file-checks.json: checks.VAL-ART-054.attachmentsCount = 0 and upload dir absent

assertions.issues: Add-article flow does not surface invalid attachment error; user only sees 'Article created successfully' despite upload rejection.

steps.action: Create article with attachment title filled but no file selected
steps.expected: Article saves without error and no attachment row is created
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/articles/17/edit, no error shown, attachments section shows 'No attachments yet.'

evidence.network: Browser captured article create POST; supplemental API check POST /api/admin/articles/17/attachments with title only -> 200 {"data":null} (network-curl-evidence.txt)
evidence.dbFileChecks: db-file-checks.json: checks.VAL-ART-055.attachmentsCount = 0 and upload dir absent

frictions.description: VAL-ART-014: input[type=number] blocks alphabetic typing, so 'abc' cannot be entered directly in browser automation.
frictions.resolution: Temporarily switched the order input type to text in-page via agent-browser eval, then validated the expected numeric error message.

frictions.description: agent-browser network export includes method/URL/headers but omits response status/body details.
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental curl request/response evidence with status codes and payloads in network-curl-evidence.txt.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed. Failed assertion: VAL-ART-054 (invalid attachment type is backend-rejected with no DB/file write, but add flow does not show a user-facing error).
